Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Guild Heads]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 2''' — There are three Guild Heads onboard the ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — The presence of three Guild Heads in the Capital causes a stir.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — The Guild Heads arrived on Calder's ship.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 22''' — Some Guild Heads are only elected if they can bond to a particular Vessel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 22''' — Guild Heads are entities that must be fought through.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — The Guild Heads stayed to witness the fight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 10''' — The meeting consisted only of Guild Heads.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 10''' — The Guild Heads have opinions on how to win the upcoming fight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 13''' — The Emperor knows the Guild Heads personally.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
